description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:17.05.0-ce Docker image with a docker:17.09.0-ce-dind service and defines variables APP_NAME=demo, REPO_PATH=chvanikoff/mnesia-demo, VERSION=0.0.1. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs in this stage. In the before_script, log in to the GitLab Container Registry with `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com`. In the script, execute `docker build --build-arg VERSION=$VERSION --build-arg APP=$APP_NAME -t registry.gitlab.com/$REPO_PATH:latest -t registry.gitlab.com/$REPO_PATH:$VERSION .`, then push both tags with `docker push registry.gitlab.com/$REPO_PATH:$VERSION` and `docker push registry.gitlab.com/$REPO_PATH:latest`. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
